testcase.name: testPassThroughWelcome

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Unable to launch WebDriverAgent. Original error: xcodebuild failed with code 65. This usually indicates an issue with the local Xcode setup or WebDriverAgent project configuration or the driver-to-platform version mismatch. Consider checking the WebDriverAgent configuration guide for real iOS devices at https://appium.github.io/appium-xcuitest-driver/latest/preparation/real-device-config/.. Make sure you follow the tutorial at https://appium.github.io/appium-xcuitest-driver/latest/preparation/real-device-config/ Host info: host: 'MacBook-Pro.local', ip: 'fd88:197c:787a:0:1c2b:edc0:b7e2:f4e7%en0' Build info: version: '4.13.0', revision: 'ba948ece5b*' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'x86_64', os.version: '26.5', java.version: '1.8.0_261' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.ios.IOSDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[{appium:useNewWDA=true, appium:udid=00008150-00084CDE0CF0401C, appium:xcodeOrgId=3RZUQ28RXP, appium:showXcodeLog=true, appium:newCommandTimeout=120, appium:xcodeSigningId=Apple Development, appium:allowProvisioningDeviceRegistration=true, appium:bundleId=com.vamapps.The-Coach, platformName=IOS, appium:deviceName=iPhone 17 Pro Max, appium:automationName=XCuiTest, appium:updatedWDABundleId=com.vamapps.WebDriverAgentRunner, appium:platformVersion=26.5}], desiredCapabilities=Capabilities {appium:allowProvisioningDeviceRegistration: true, appium:automationName: XCuiTest, appium:bundleId: com.vamapps.The-Coach, appium:deviceName: iPhone 17 Pro Max, appium:newCommandTimeout: 120, appium:platformVersion: 26.5, appium:showXcodeLog: true, appium:udid: 00008150-00084CDE0CF0401C, appium:updatedWDABundleId: com.vamapps.WebDriverAgentR..., appium:useNewWDA: true, appium:xcodeOrgId: 3RZUQ28RXP, appium:xcodeSigningId: Apple Development, platformName: IOS}}] Capabilities {appium:allowProvisioningDeviceRegistration: true, appium:automationName: XCuiTest, appium:bundleId: com.vamapps.The-Coach, appium:deviceName: iPhone 17 Pro Max, appium:newCommandTimeout: 120, appium:platformVersion: 26.5, appium:showXcodeLog: true, appium:udid: 00008150-00084CDE0CF0401C, appium:updatedWDABundleId: com.vamapps.WebDriverAgentR..., appium:useNewWDA: true, appium:xcodeOrgId: 3RZUQ28RXP, appium:xcodeSigningId: Apple Development, platformName: IOS}

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Unable to launch WebDriverAgent. Original error: xcodebuild failed with code 65. This usually indicates an issue with the local Xcode setup or WebDriverAgent project configuration or the driver-to-platform version mismatch. Consider checking the WebDriverAgent configuration guide for real iOS devices at https://appium.github.io/appium-xcuitest-driver/latest/preparation/real-device-config/.. Make sure you follow the tutorial at https://appium.github.io/appium-xcuitest-driver/latest/preparation/real-device-config/ Host info: host: 'MacBook-Pro.local', ip: 'fd88:197c:787a:0:1c2b:edc0:b7e2:f4e7%en0' Build info: version: '4.13.0', revision: 'ba948ece5b*' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'x86_64', os.version: '26.5', java.version: '1.8.0_261' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.ios.IOSDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[{appium:useNewWDA=true, appium:udid=00008150-00084CDE0CF0401C, appium:xcodeOrgId=3RZUQ28RXP, appium:showXcodeLog=true, appium:newCommandTimeout=120, appium:xcodeSigningId=Apple Development, appium:allowProvisioningDeviceRegistration=true, appium:bundleId=com.vamapps.The-Coach, platformName=IOS, appium:deviceName=iPhone 17 Pro Max, appium:automationName=XCuiTest, appium:updatedWDABundleId=com.vamapps.WebDriverAgentRunner, appium:platformVersion=26.5}], desiredCapabilities=Capabilities {appium:allowProvisioningDeviceRegistration: true, appium:automationName: XCuiTest, appium:bundleId: com.vamapps.The-Coach, appium:deviceName: iPhone 17 Pro Max, appium:newCommandTimeout: 120, appium:platformVersion: 26.5, appium:showXcodeLog: true, appium:udid: 00008150-00084CDE0CF0401C, appium:updatedWDABundleId: com.vamapps.WebDriverAgentR..., appium:useNewWDA: true, appium:xcodeOrgId: 3RZUQ28RXP, appium:xcodeSigningId: Apple Development, platformName: IOS}}] Capabilities {appium:allowProvisioningDeviceRegistration: true, appium:automationName: XCuiTest, appium:bundleId: com.vamapps.The-Coach, appium:deviceName: iPhone 17 Pro Max, appium:newCommandTimeout: 120, appium:platformVersion: 26.5, appium:showXcodeLog: true, testcase.system-err: log4j:WARN No appenders could be found for logger (io.netty.util.internal.logging.InternalLoggerFactory). log4j:WARN Please initialize the log4j system properly. log4j:WARN See http://logging.apache.org/log4j/1.2/faq.html#noconfig for more info.
